description: Deploy LibreChat with Cassini MCP server via Docker Compose. The setup extends the LibreChat image with Bun and the Cassini MCP server, configures MongoDB and Meilisearch services, and wires up the MCP stdio transport so LibreChat can query the Cassini mission database.

tasks.title: Create librechat/Dockerfile extending LibreChat with Bun + Cassini MCP
tasks.description:
Create a Dockerfile that extends the official LibreChat image and adds Bun runtime plus the Cassini MCP server.

- Base image: ghcr.io/danny-avila/librechat:latest (or a pinned version)
- Install Bun (curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash)
- Copy the mcp-server/ directory into the image
- Run bun install inside mcp-server/ to install dependencies
- The MCP server will be invoked via stdio transport by LibreChat at runtime
acceptanceCriteria: Built image contains mcp-server/ with node_modules

tasks.title: Create librechat/docker-compose.yml with api, mongodb, meilisearch
tasks.description:
Create a Docker Compose file defining the services needed to run LibreChat with Cassini MCP.

Services:
- api: builds from ./Dockerfile, ports 3080:3080, depends on mongodb and meilisearch, mounts librechat.yaml config, uses env_file .env
- mongodb: mongo image, persistent volume for data
- meilisearch: meilisearch image, persistent volume for data, MEILI_NO_ANALYTICS=true

Volumes for data persistence across restarts.
acceptanceCriteria: librechat/docker-compose.yml exists with api, mongodb, meilisearch services
api service builds from local Dockerfile
api service mounts librechat.yaml as config
mongodb and meilisearch have persistent volumes
docker compose config validates without errors

tasks.title: Create librechat/librechat.yaml and librechat/.env.example
tasks.description:
Create the LibreChat YAML configuration with Cassini MCP stdio config, and an .env.example with required environment variables.

librechat.yaml:
- Configure the Cassini MCP server as a stdio tool
- Command: bun run /app/mcp-server/index.ts (path inside the Docker image)
- Set appropriate model and endpoint configuration

.env.example:
- ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=your-key-here (or relevant provider keys)
- MONGO_URI=mongodb://mongodb:27017/LibreChat
- MEILI_HOST=http://meilisearch:7700
- Any other required LibreChat env vars with placeholder values
acceptanceCriteria: librechat/librechat.yaml configures Cassini MCP server via stdio
librechat/.env.example lists all required environment variables
MCP server command path matches Dockerfile COPY destination
YAML is valid and follows LibreChat config schema

tasks.title: Update root .gitignore for LibreChat runtime data
tasks.description:
Add entries to the root .gitignore to exclude LibreChat runtime files that should not be committed.

Entries to add:
- librechat/.env (actual env file with secrets)
- librechat/data/ (MongoDB/Meilisearch volume data if stored locally)
- librechat/logs/ (runtime logs)
- Any other generated files from docker compose
acceptanceCriteria: Root .gitignore includes librechat runtime data directories
